nasb.text: These are they who served the king, apart from those whom the king put in the fortified cities through all Judah.

esv.text: These were in the service of the king, besides those whom the king had placed in the fortified cities throughout all Judah.

cnv.text: 這些人都是服事王的；還有王在猶大全地各設防城裡安置的，沒有計算在內。

ccb.text: 以上都是服侍王的军兵，不包括王派去驻守犹大各坚城的军兵。
